creator: rodrigc@crodrigues.org
text:
Hi,

Where is the need for this coming from?
Who is asking for a port of APR 0.9?

It seems like a lot of effort, for not much benefit.

-- 
Craig Rodrigues
rodrigc@crodrigues.org

On Mon, May 05, 2008 at 09:20:07PM +0000, Philip M. Gollucci wrote:
>  In hind site, neither of us are right.
>  
>  I'm been talking to dev@apr.apache.org
>  
>  We shoul do a scaled down version of this since apr1.x is forward
>  compatible.
>  
>  devel/apr0  0.9.x series
>  devel/apr1  1.x series
>  devel/apr2  2.x series
>  
>  Do note, that these APIs are _NOT_ compatible backwards or forward.
>  
>  Even if you don't want to repo copy it, can we at least rename it to
>  devel/apr1 so that when arp2 does come out it will be less painful.
>  
>  
>  - --
>  - ------------------------------------------------------------------------
>  Philip M. Gollucci (philip@ridecharge.com)
